risks.observedIssue: Interactive installed-extension control was unavailable from Codex.
risks.evidence: Chrome connector failed before sidepanel control; no live extension screenshot was captured.
risks.recommendedAction: Run installed extension QA manually or repair browser connector before any HTML, manifest, or JS milestone.

risks.observedIssue: Keyboard focus visibility could not be confirmed in the installed extension.

risks.recommendedAction: Validate tab order and focus-visible state in installed Chrome.

risks.observedIssue: Live perception of blocked runtime/model/governance surfaces remains unconfirmed.

risks.recommendedAction: Confirm Runtime and model surfaces read as blocked and non-active before broad UI work.
